samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Implement a module for edge detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="ZERO" description="State ZERO">0</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="ONE" description="State ONE">1</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <name>i_state</name>
            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
        </reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <name>i_next_state</name>
            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <parablock>
            <statement>
                <text>Always block for updating state on positive edge of clk or negative edge of rst_n</text>
                <condition>
                    <or>
                        <and>
                            <input-ref id="clk"/>
                            <op>==</op>
                            <const>1'b1</const>
                        </and>
                        <and>
                            <input-ref id="rst_n"/>
                            <op>==</op>
                            <const>1'b0</const>
                        </and>
                    </or>
                </condition>
                <statement>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <input-ref id="rst_n"/>
                            <op>==</op>
                            <const>1'b0</const>
                        </condition>
                        <statement>
                            <text>Reset condition: Set state to ZERO</text>
                            <assign>
                                <lhs>
                                    <reg-ref id="i_state"/>
                                </lhs>
                                <rhs>
                                    <enum-ref id="ZERO"/>
                                </rhs>
                            </assign>
                        </statement>
                        <else>
                            <statement>
                                <text>Update state based on next state</text>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>
                                        <reg-ref id="i_state"/>
                                    </lhs>
                                    <rhs>
                                        <reg-ref id="i_next_state"/>
                                    </rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </statement>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </statement>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <text>Always block for combinational logic to determine next state</text>
                <condition>
                    <input-ref id="clk"/>
                    <op>==</op>
                    <const>1'b0</const>
                </condition>
                <statement>
                    <text>Initialize next state to current state</text>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>
                            <reg-ref id="i_next_state"/>
                        </lhs>
                        <rhs>
                            <reg-ref id="i_state"/>
                        </rhs>
                    </assign>
                </statement>
                <statement>
                    <text>Case statement for determining next state based on current state and input a</text>
                    <case>
                        <switch>
                            <reg-ref id="i_state"/>
                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                        </switch>
                        <case-item>
                            <condition>
                                <and>
                                    <input-ref id="a"/>
                                    <op>==</op>
                                    <const>1'b1</const>
                                </and>
                            </condition>
                            <statement>
                                <text>Transition to state ONE</text>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>
                                        <reg-ref id="i_next_state"/>
                                    </lhs>
                                    <rhs>
                                        <enum-ref id="ONE"/>
                                    </rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </statement>
                        </case-item>
                        <case-item>
                            <condition>
                                <and>
                                    <input-ref id="a"/>
                                    <op>==</op>
                                    <const>1'b0</const>
                                </and>
                            </condition>
                            <statement>
                                <text>Transition to state ZERO</text>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>
                                        <reg-ref id="i_next_state"/>
                                    </lhs>
                                    <rhs>
                                        <enum-ref id="ZERO"/>
                                    </rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </statement>
                        </case-item>
                    </case>
                </statement>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <text>Always block for generating output signals based on state and input a</text>
                <condition>
                    <input-ref id="clk"/>
                    <op>==</op>
                    <const>1'b1</const>
                </condition>
                <statement>
                    <text>Initialize rise and down output signals to 0</text>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>
                            <output-ref id="rise"/>
                        </lhs>
                        <rhs>
                            <const>1'b0</const>
                        </rhs>
                    </assign>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>
                            <output-ref id="down"/>
                        </lhs>
                        <rhs>
                            <const>1'b0</const>
                        </rhs>
                    </assign>
                </statement>
                <statement>
                    <text>Case statement for generating output signals based on current state and input a</text>
                    <case>
                        <switch>
                            <reg-ref id="i_state"/>
                            <enum-value id="ZERO"/>
                        </switch>
                        <case-item>
                            <condition>
                                <and>
                                    <input-ref id="a"/>
                                    <op>==</op>
                                    <const>1'b1</const>
                                </and>
                            </condition>
                            <statement>
                                <text>Set rise output signal to 1</text>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>
                                        <output-ref id="rise"/>
                                    </lhs>
                                    <rhs>
                                        <const>1'b1</const>
                                    </rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </statement>
                        </case-item>
                        <case-item>
                            <condition>
                                <and>
                                    <input-ref id="a"/>
                                    <op>==</op>
                                    <const>1'b0</const>
                                </and>
                            </condition>
                            <statement>
                                <text>Set down output signal to 1</text>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>
                                        <output-ref id="down"/>
                                    </lhs>
                                    <rhs>
                                        <const>1'b1</const>
                                    </rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </statement>
                        </case-item>
                    </case>
                </statement>
            </statement>
        </parablock>
    </implementation>
</module>
